chapter_title: Department of the California Highway Patrol
text: The commissioner may purchase or lease such real estate and erect such buildings as the department or any of its divisions require, subject to the approval of the Department of General Services.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 3. Powers and Duties [2400 - 2429.9]
##### § 2405

The commissioner may purchase or lease such real estate and erect such buildings as the department or any of its divisions require, subject to the approval of the Department of General Services.

*(Amended by Stats. 1965, Ch. 371.)*

subsections.text: The commissioner may purchase or lease such real estate and erect such buildings as the department or any of its divisions require, subject to the approval of the Department of General Services.
